home.title: La Cour de Haut
home.description: Book your stay at La Cour de Haut — a unique getaway in the heart of France.

book.title: Book your stay
book.description: Reserve your perfect stay at La Cour de Haut.

hero.description: A captivating introduction to the website, featuring a visually striking image and a compelling headline that immediately grabs the visitor's attention.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Privacy policy of La Cour de Haut — how we process your personal data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: La Cour de Haut processes personal data in connection with booking requests. This notice explains what data we collect, why, and how long we retain it.
privacy.dataCollectedBody: Through the booking form we collect: your first and last name, email address, phone number, and your requested stay dates.
privacy.purposeTitle: Why do we use your data?
privacy.purposeBody: We use your data solely to respond to your booking request, confirm availability, and provide further payment and stay information.
privacy.retentionTitle: How long do we retain your data?
privacy.retentionBody: We retain your data for as long as necessary to handle your booking request and any related correspondence. You can request deletion at any time by contacting us.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. For questions or requests, please contact us at: info@lacourdehaut.fr.

form.name: First and last name
form.successMessage: Thank you for your booking! We will contact you shortly.
form.errorMessage: An error occurred while processing your booking. Please try again later or contact us by email or phone.
form.datesUnavailable: The selected dates are no longer available. Please choose different dates.
form.totalPrice: Total price: {pricePerNight} x {totalNights} nights = {totalPrice} including tourism tax: {tourismTax}
form.disclaimer: After submitting the booking form, we will contact you to confirm availability and provide further details and payment instructions. Your booking will only be finalized after our confirmation and receipt of payment.

fieldErrors.email: Please enter a valid email address
fieldErrors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
fieldErrors.dateRange: The check-out date must be after the check-in date
fieldErrors.guestCount: Number of guests must be 1 or 2
fieldErrors.minNights: Select at least 2 dates for a minimum stay of 1 night

booking.privacyNotice: By submitting this form you agree to our <link>privacy policy</link>.
